item.title: Return of the Meme: 1209 (bone opinions)
item.description:
Another day, another bread. Let's get it.
Beep
That's gonna work well.
I'm ordering Scythian style robes, so maybe soon I will be able to wear robes to work?
Oily Joseph.
Boillllĺ
Wheeeee
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hi Pippin! Good boy Pippin !"

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Hilarious Wednesday meme dump of pure chaos
item.description:
1. Good advice!
2
3. So guys, here is my tutorial
4
5
6. What is the dumbest tradition you can think of?
7. Caught red handed
8
9. This can't be true, can it? Imagine going out and renting a pinepale
10
11. I thought she was with you!
12. How trick people and make friends (his head went dangerously close to the counter edge, tho)
13. Arnold on how to make money
14. A true pro
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, whole you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. But there are lots of stuff to do in there, for example JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
looks like bug central
sorry everyone
big dog
that's it. moving to Finland
not wrong
the hair is weirding me out more than the clothes
finally, a new liquid
very odd looking, hard to figure out what happened
i love pistachios
mmm hmm
does it mean new zealand folk or actual kiwis
badass alert
animal hoarders are terrible people but the comment made me lol
no need to brag
i'd eat it
it's important
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Images of Note: Someone is
item.description:
That is pretty metal
More fluttershy swearing pls
Professionals have standards
I have no idea what's going on, I'm just here for the JoJo Train
pls let me believe this ;_;
Chaotic positive masculinity
That mimic is going to become part of the party
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Sony what the fuck is wrong with you
:o
COCK TUGS
mood
This is a wonderful approach to gender.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Government Cheese
Know what, they're half right, British aren't real, but legally they are.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1267
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/1Wrk3Mr Wholesome Post 1266 https://imgur.com/gallery/P60zU8H Wholesome Post 1265 https://imgur.com/gallery/YzY8JKZ Wholesome Post 1264 https://imgur.com/gallery/IKPlEkK Wholesome Post 1263 https://imgur.com/gallery/6UUGYHZ Wholesome Post 1262 https://imgur.com/gallery/aBdwZJ3 Wholesome Post 1261 https://imgur.com/gallery/hKWZSvB Wholesome Post 1260
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.modestneeds.org/features/ledger/viewapp.asp?source=BrowseRequest&mode=upd&rp=l&id=634068
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48

item.title: I still want a Dredd sequel with him
item.description: While filming 2012's DREDD, Karl Urban refused to smile or take the helmet off at any point during the movie's filming or even in between takes. The actor spoke with an American accent, kept a scowl and remained completely serious to keep in character. At one point, a cast member made a joke that caused laughter on the set - and Urban gave them the Judge Dredd stare, prompting the person to apologize.
item.dc:creator: Ilovetomakestuffup

item.title: Mother's Day, or Mothers' Day as the case may be, is this Sunday
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: What can be gained from it?
item.description: I'm a woman, swiping through men on Tinder. Suddenly, one of my Facebook photos is there. Someone used my Facebook photos but is registered as a man? Why? Is this an AI bot thing? Has anyone else had this happen to them? I'm guessing it's one of my Facebook friends unless my account was hacked or something.

item.dc:creator: fs20020

item.title: Ireland's Eurovision entry, I only heard about them for the first time yesterday and couldn't be more proud, instantly a fan.
item.description: First Irish Eurovision act in my lifetime that i would actually go and see perform live, we have sent so many... lets say poop... acts in the past. Did a double take when i saw just a few second clip last night after they qualified for the finals and had to go watch the full song and look into them. Couldn't believe it was Ireland, 30 years ago they most likely would have been fined or jailed for such a song or performance. Thought it was worth sharing here anyway, im sure others will enjoy :) Sauce me up baby: Artist: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bambie_Thug Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BNc5zTYkTaQ Screenshot 1: https://www.irishexaminer.com/lifestyle/artsandculture/arid-41389666.html Screenshot 2: https://www.irishexaminer.com/news/munster/arid-41390392.html
item.dc:creator: IRCBrink
